expectations.text: Stories file was read completely before any implementation
expectations.evidence: Step 1 Load State shows stories-basic.json was read first with full parse: '2 stories, both status pending'. All files read before Step 5 (Implement).

expectations.text: Epic context fields were referenced: decisions, risks, outOfScope, or references
expectations.evidence: Step 1b explicitly extracts all four epic context fields: decisions (['Use existing file patterns', 'Keep changes minimal and focused']), risks (['Test fixture -- changes will be reverted after eval']), outOfScope (['New features', 'Refactoring existing code']), references (['CLAUDE.md'])

expectations.text: Story context fields were referenced: context.why, context.risks, or context.edgeCases
expectations.evidence: Step 1b extracts all story context fields: context.why ('Verify that Spectrum reads epic context...'), context.risks (['File may not exist if prism-eval was not built']), context.edgeCases (['Empty file', 'File already has the comment']), context.patterns (['Follow existing comment style'])

expectations.text: Quality gates were executed (echo commands from epic.qualityGates)
expectations.evidence: Step 6: 'echo typecheck: OK -- PASSED' and 'echo lint: OK -- PASSED'. Both quality gates from epic.qualityGates executed.

expectations.text: Story announcement included spectrum-story signal with ID and Title
expectations.evidence:
Step 4: '<spectrum-story>
ID: EVAL-001
Title: Add eval test comment to mock-data.ts
Priority: 1
Files: prism-eval/src/data/mock-data.ts (modify)
</spectrum-story>'

expectations.text: Progress.md was updated with a completion entry
expectations.evidence: Step 8 shows simulated progress.md append with full entry: '## 2026-03-07 - EVAL-001 Complete' including What was done, Learnings, Files changed, Quality gates sections

expectations.text: Only EVAL-001 was executed (EVAL-002 is blocked by EVAL-001)
expectations.evidence: Step 3: 'EVAL-001 (priority 1, blockedBy: null) -- SELECTED' and 'EVAL-002 (priority 2, blockedBy: EVAL-001) -- BLOCKED, skipped'. Only EVAL-001 was implemented.
